## ![][image1]

# 

# Content Idea Bank

Start by filling out the highlighted boxes below \- this will be replicated throughout this document to set up this content idea bank to work the best for you.

**Your Client Avatar Planning Stages**	  
*Please fill in these boxes with your planning stages if you've changed them*

| Stage 1: | Pre-engagement |
| :---- | :---- |
| Stage 2: | Ideas & Inspiration |
| Stage 3: | Highest Priority Decisions |
| Stage 4: | Executing the Vision |
| Stage 5: | Filling in the Details |

**Your Story Brand one-liner**	  
*Please fill in with your final Story Brand one-liner from your 'Creating Your Irresistible Brand' Workbook*

Your Story Brand one-liner

**Your Unique Value Proposition**  
*Please fill in with your final Unique Value Proposition one-liner from your 'Creating Your Irresistible Brand' Workbook*

Your Unique Value Proposition	

# Stage 1 \- 	Pre-engagement					

| Your Story Brand one-liner: Your Story Brand one-liner |
| :---- |
| **Your Unique Value Proposition: Your Unique Value Proposition** |

**Example Ideas:**

* Thinking about more serious commitment  
* Date nights  
* Proposals  
* Engagement rings  
* Engagement parties  
* Engagement session

# Stage 2 \- 	Ideas & Inspiration			

| Your Story Brand one-liner: Your Story Brand one-liner |
| :---- |
| **Your Unique Value Proposition: Your Unique Value Proposition** |

**Example Ideas:**

* Gets engaged or decides they want to get married  
* Trying to figure out what kind of wedding to have  
* Might tell friends and family  
* Starting looking for inspiration and brainstorming ideas, time of year, and locations


# Stage 3 \- 	Highest Priority Decisions		

| Your Story Brand one-liner: Your Story Brand one-liner |
| :---- |
| **Your Unique Value Proposition: Your Unique Value Proposition** |

**Example Ideas:**

* Has some ideas for their day  
* Determining the feasibility of ideas  
* Researching & selecting date & location  
* Determining budget  
* Deciding on guests  
* Researching & booking highest priority vendors (planner, photographer, etc.)

# Stage 4 \- Executing the Vision			

| Your Story Brand one-liner: Your Story Brand one-liner |
| :---- |
| **Your Unique Value Proposition: Your Unique Value Proposition** |

**Example Ideas:**

* Researching & hiring must-have vendors (photographer, caterer, etc.)  
* Making styling decisions and shopping for most important attire & details (rings, custom-made wedding attire)  
* Planning any travel, booking flights & lodging  
* Starting to create a timeline

# Stage 5 \- 	Filling in the Details		

| Your Story Brand one-liner: Your Story Brand one-liner |
| :---- |
| **Your Unique Value Proposition: Your Unique Value Proposition** |

**Example Ideas:**

* Booking any final remaining vendors needed (hair & makeup artist, florist, officiant, etc.)  
* Finalizing timeline  
* Shopping for remaining attire, accessories, details, and decor  
* Planning out the ceremony  
* Organizing last-minute logistics & details (transportation, etc.)
